content: We can frame the LLM self-reflection training process as a graded high school language arts writing workshop, where each iterative self-correction step the LLM makes is equivalent to a student revising a draft essay based on their own reflective self-editing. Just as student writers learn to spot inconsistencies in their own arguments through repeated structured reflection practice, LLMs can learn to refine their outputs by contrasting inconsistent solution perspectives drawn from their own generated attempts.
